menu:
android:id="@+id/search_textbox" app:actionViewClass="androidx.appcompat.widget.SearchView" android:icon="@drawable/ic_search_white_24dp" app:showAsAction="always|collapseActionView" android:title="@string/stringSearch">
android:id="@+id/cover_size" android:icon="@drawable/ic_view_module_white_24dp" app:showAsAction="always" android:title="@string/grid_item_size">
android:id="@+id/cover_size_small" android:title="@string/small"/> android:id="@+id/cover_size_normal" android:title="@string/normal"/> android:id="@+id/cover_size_large" android:title="@string/large"/> android:id="@+id/sort" android:icon="@drawable/ic_sort_white_24dp" app:showAsAction="ifRoom" android:title="@string/stringSort"> android:id="@+id/menuSortTitle" android:title="@string/sortTitle"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortRelease" android:title="@string/sortRelease"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortDuration" android:title="@string/sortDuration"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortRating" android:title="@string/sortRating"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortWeightedRating" android:title="@string/sortWeightedRating"/> android:id="@+id/menuSortAdded" android:title="@string/sortAdded"/> android:id="@+id/update" android:icon="@drawable/ic_sync_white_24dp" android:title="@string/menuUpdateTitle">
